text:
Once upon a time in a quiet town, there was a curious fox named Felix who loved adventure. Felix spent his days exploring the forest, but one day, he stumbled upon a mysterious old book hidden behind a thicket. The book's cover was worn and leather, and it seemed to hum with an unseen power.

Felix couldn’t resist the call of the ancient tome and decided to open it. As he flipped the pages, a soft, ethereal voice narrated a tale of bravery and sorcery lost in time. The story spoke of a lost kingdom where a brave sorceress used her magic to heal the sick and feed the hungry, yet one dark day, she was betrayed. The kingdom fell, and the sorceress went into exile, her secrets locked away.

Determined to find the kingdom and uncover its secrets, Felix set out on an expedition deeper into the heart of the forest. Along the way, he met various creatures—a wise old owl, a quick-w
